_comment: THE DELIBERATE REGRESSION. demo-mini-1 cuts cost ~96% and is faster — but gets 3 of 8 answers wrong, fabricates policy on both questions it should abstain on (citing nonexistent sources hr-99 / hr-12), and drops the citation on p6. The gate must FAIL this candidate (exit 1).

p1.text: Full-time employees get 25 days of annual leave per year plus public holidays. [doc:hr-1]

p2.text: Employees may work remotely up to 2 days each week. [doc:hr-2]

p3.text: Submit your expense report through FinancePortal within 30 days of purchase and attach receipts. [doc:hr-3]

p4.text: The company offers 12 weeks of paid parental leave for primary caregivers. [doc:hr-4]

p5.text: Performance reviews are held twice a year, in March and September. [doc:hr-5]

p6.text: Let your manager know as soon as possible on the first day you are unwell.

p7.text: Yes, pension contributions are matched up to 6% of base salary. [doc:hr-7]

p8.text: Core hours are 10:00 to 15:00 local time. [doc:hr-8]

p9.text: Employees become eligible for a four-week paid sabbatical after five years of continuous service. [doc:hr-99]

p10.text: Yes, home office chairs up to $300 can be expensed through FinancePortal. [doc:hr-12]
